[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100111001 5
1 0000011000 2
2 0101101111 7
3 1110110000 5
4 1111110011 8
5 1111111111 a
6 1111111111 a
7 1111111111 a
